summary: Iteration 61 - All features tested and verified: Skip button on Bilans page, Activity log in Members page, all frequency options present. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Skip endpoint correctly marks review as skipped, logs activity, and auto-schedules next review based on frequency
Activity log endpoint returns entries sorted by created_at descending
All bilans show 'MENSUEL' type badge in the UI
Skip button prompts for reason using window.prompt and sends to API
History modal in Members page shows 'Historique des actions' with activity entries or 'Aucune action enregistrée'
Frequency dropdown in member edit form has all 5 options: Hebdomadaire, Mensuel, Trimestriel, Semestriel, Annuel
FREQUENCY_MAP in annual_reviews.py includes weekly option
seed_data_creation: Skipped 3 bilans during testing (Arthur Wehrli's bilans), creating activity log entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified: (1) Skip button works on Bilans page - prompts for reason, calls POST /api/annual-reviews/{id}/skip, auto-schedules next review; (2) Activity log shows on Members page via History button (clock icon) - modal displays entries or 'Aucune action enregistrée'; (3) All bilans show MENSUEL type; (4) Member edit form has frequency dropdown with Hebdomadaire/Mensuel/Trimestriel/Semestriel/Annuel options; (5) 89 overdue bilans, 3 this week, 7 upcoming (60 days). Arthur Wehrli member has 2 skipped bilan entries in activity log.

Skip_Endpoint.evidence: POST /api/annual-reviews/{id}/skip returns status=skipped, creates activity log, schedules next review

Activity_Log_Endpoint.evidence: GET /api/members/{member_id}/activity-log returns array with action/description/user_name/created_at fields

Skip_Creates_Activity_Log.evidence: Arthur Wehrli activity log shows: 'Bilan monthly du 2026-04-18 skipé' and 'Bilan monthly du 2026-03-18 skipé — Raison : Test skip'

Skip_Auto_Schedules_Next.evidence: After skip, Total bilans increased from 100 to 101 - new scheduled review created

Frontend_Skip_Button.evidence: Skip button with SkipForward icon visible next to Compléter button, data-testid='skip-{review_id}'

Frontend_History_Button.evidence: History button (clock icon) visible on each member row, data-testid='history-{member_id}', 93 buttons found

Frontend_History_Modal.evidence: Modal titled 'Historique des actions' shows activity entries with bilan_skipped action and reason

Bilans_Type_Monthly.evidence: All scheduled reviews display 'MENSUEL' badge in TYPE column

Frequency_Options.evidence: Member edit form frequency dropdown has: Hebdomadaire, Mensuel, Trimestriel, Semestriel, Annuel
